operatorPrincipleTitle: The broker stays in judgment mode.
operatorPrincipleBody: The Operator handles the repetitive execution layer: replying, qualifying, booking, creating tasks, updating systems, and filtering noise before it reaches the broker.
operatorPrincipleMetricDetail: of today's operational actions handled without interrupting the broker.
todaySummaryBody: Replies sent, leads qualified, showings booked, systems updated, and only three items routed to the broker.

activityFeed.summary: Qualified new buyer lead from WhatsApp
Sent follow-up to cold lead from last week
Created Asana task for inspection deadline

messages.speaker: Lead
messages.message: Hi, is the Ocean Parkway property still available?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Yes, it is. Are you currently working with another broker?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Great. Are you looking to buy within the next 90 days?

messages.speaker: Seller
messages.message: We may list our Borough Park condo next month. Can someone give us a realistic range?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Absolutely. I can collect the key details now so the broker has the right context before advising.

messages.speaker: Operator Action
messages.message: Started seller valuation intake + created follow-up task.

messages.speaker: Lead
messages.message: Can the broker negotiate the price if I make an offer today?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: I'm flagging this for broker review so the offer strategy is handled correctly.

messages.speaker: Caller
messages.message: Missed call from Eli Weiss at 10:36 AM

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Sent callback text and asked whether this is about selling, buying, or valuation.

tasks.title: Send buyer packet to David Rosen
Follow up with seller valuation for Miriam Cohen
Request pre-approval letter from Sarah Klein
Review offer terms for Jacob Stein

escalations.title: Negotiation request from buyer
escalations.why: Lead asked whether the broker can negotiate price if an offer is made today.
escalations.next: Review buyer motivation and advise whether to open below ask or request seller context first.
escalations.draft: I can help you structure the offer. Before we decide on price, I want to understand your timing and ceiling so we negotiate from strength.

escalations.title: Seller asking about reducing commission
escalations.why: Commission discussion requires relationship judgment and positioning.
escalations.next: Anchor on service value, market exposure, and net outcome before discussing concessions.
escalations.draft: I understand the question. The real number that matters is your net result, and I can walk you through how our process protects that.

escalations.title: Client wants custom contract terms
escalations.why: Contract language may affect risk, timing, or negotiation posture.
escalations.next: Ask for the requested terms, then decide whether counsel should review before replying.
escalations.draft: Send me the exact terms you want included. I'll review the business impact and let you know what is reasonable to propose.

demoScenario.title: Live Demo Scenario
steps: The broker only gets notified if human judgment is needed

events.summary: Escalation created because negotiation was detected
